sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106230" key="u(gro/bhc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑγρό-βηξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">βηχος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n106230.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">moist cough,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0733.tlg001:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cass.Fel.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">33</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
